facts.claim: CAQH credentialing takes 60-90 days for panel approval - apply to 5+ panels simultaneously
facts.support: Multiple therapist reports on r/therapists showing 2-4 month typical timelines

facts.claim: Attestation must be completed every 120 days or your CAQH profile becomes inactive
facts.support: CAQH official documentation and confirmed by multiple credentialing consultants

facts.claim: BCBS, Aetna, and Cigna typically have the fastest credentialing timelines (45-60 days)
facts.support: Therapist community reports; varies by state

decisions: Which 5-7 panels to apply to first based on state prevalence and timeline
Whether to apply to Medicare and Medicaid (lower rates but high patient volume)
When to start marketing before credentialing is complete
pitfalls: Applying to only 1-2 panels initially delays revenue by 6+ months
Forgetting CAQH attestation causes profile to go inactive mid-application
Not authorizing specific panels to access CAQH data before submitting applications
contradictions: Some sources say apply to Medicare first, others say apply to commercial panels first - depends on your patient population
Credentialing timelines vary significantly by state; national averages are not reliable
